purpose: 公开研究驱动的 QuantLab 总系统升级来源日志
accessPolicy: Only public, user-provided, or user-authorized sources are allowed. Unauthorized credentials, cookies, scraping, and private platform data are excluded.

sources.name: Microsoft Qlib
sources.usedFor: AI-oriented quantitative research workflow, data/model/workflow separation
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Borrow workflow and experiment-recording concepts; do not migrate QuantLab wholesale.

sources.name: QuantConnect LEAN
sources.usedFor: Event-driven algorithm engine, backtesting engine design, implementation-risk comparison
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Use as reference engine and conceptual benchmark; keep live trading disabled.

sources.name: vectorbt
sources.usedFor: Vectorized backtesting, parameter sweeps, large grid research
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Adopt parameter-grid and array-first ideas for QuantLab scanner; optional backend only after tests.

sources.name: Backtrader
sources.usedFor: Strategy, indicator, analyzer and ledger-style examples
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Use as strategy education/reference engine; do not replace current QuantLab core.

sources.name: OpenBB Open Data Platform
sources.usedFor: Provider abstraction, local-first data integration, standardized financial data interfaces
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Build QuantLab Data Provider Registry around similar provider-layer concepts.

sources.name: moomoo OpenAPI
sources.accessStatus: 公开可访问；账户能力需要用户授权
sources.usedFor: OpenD, SDK, authorized market data access
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Use read-only market data as primary candidate when user authorization and OpenD readiness pass; keep trading calls disabled.

sources.name: AKShare
sources.usedFor: A-share and Chinese financial data interface
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Use as A-share supplementary data source with freshness and cross-source checks.

sources.name: TuShare Pro
sources.accessStatus: 公开可访问；API 调用需要 token / 积分
sources.usedFor: A-share daily indicators and market data
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Use as high-quality A-share provider after token is configured; mark blocked without token.

sources.name: Ray
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Optional backend for independent validation workers after local sharding is stable.

sources.name: Dask DataFrame
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Optional backend for batch data preparation and big validation results.

sources.name: Pandera
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Preferred lightweight first step for QuantLab data quality gates.

sources.name: Great Expectations
sources.usedFor: Validation result reports and data documentation
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Use later for shareable data-quality reports; avoid early complexity.

sources.name: FinGPT
sources.usedFor: Financial NLP, sentiment analysis, RAG and financial AI workflow reference
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Use as model/reference source for evidence-type sentiment observation; no direct trading signal.

sources.name: FinBERT
sources.adoptionRecommendation: Candidate model for market and holdings sentiment module, with source-count and freshness gates.

blockedOrConditionalSources.name: 小红书 / B站 / 知乎 / 公众号公开内容
blockedOrConditionalSources.accessStatus: 公开页面可人工查看；批量抓取通常需要授权或用户手动导出
blockedOrConditionalSources.handling: 默认标记为需要授权或需要用户手动导出；不得绕过平台限制。

blockedOrConditionalSources.name: moomoo account-specific data
blockedOrConditionalSources.accessStatus: 需要用户授权、OpenD readiness、账号权限和本地连接
blockedOrConditionalSources.handling: 只读行情优先；交易接口保持禁用。

blockedOrConditionalSources.name: TuShare Pro API
blockedOrConditionalSources.accessStatus: 需要 token 和积分权限
blockedOrConditionalSources.handling: 无 token 时只能记录为 blocked，不能伪造数据。
